title: Wax Lyrical Lemon Verbena Wax Melts, Yellow
features: NEW for 2025: Enjoy all of your favourite Made in England fragrances in a more convenient format, now available in our 14 best-selling scents. All proudly made in the UK.
LEMON VERBENA: A refreshing, sparkling citrus scent combining fresh verbena with a strong heart of zesty lemon on a soft base.

WAX MELT: Simply break off a piece of the wax and place into your favourite wax melt burner, and enjoy the zesty aroma of Lemon Verbena. Use more wax for a heightened scent throw, but do not overfill. Please remember, do not use a scented tealight with any wax burner unit.
Top Note – Citrus | Heart Note – Verbena | Base Note – Musk
description: Product Description Brighten your home with the invigorating and uplifting fragrance of the Lemon Verbena Wax Melts from the Made In England collection by Wax Lyrical. This zesty scent captures the clean, crisp aroma of freshly picked lemon verbena, creating a revitalising atmosphere in any room. Safety Warning Always use a suitable wax melt burner. Do not overfill the burner. Never leave a burning wax melt unattended. Keep away from flammable materials. Do not use a scented tealight with any wax burner unit. Dispose of used wax safely and responsibly.
